summary: Hand‑held front‑of‑board audience tape captures a vivid atmosphere, highlighted by an electrifying China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider run and a soaring Playing in the Band.
review: The audience recording, mastered by JAZ, is surprisingly clear and full of ambience despite occasional crowd chatter. Musically the show shines with a legendary China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence, an inspiring Playing in the Band, and a beautiful rendition of Believe It Or Not. Overall the performance is praised as one of the standout shows of the 1988 summer tour.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (7/8) give 4‑5 stars and highlight exceptional musical moments; recording is described as very listenable with good mastering, yielding a strong combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Hand‑held front‑of‑board (FOB) audience tape with some crowd talking; JAZ mastering provides clear balance and vivid ambience, making it very listenable despite the lack of a pure soundboard feed.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: While a few reviewers note odd song choices, the high points—especially the China Cat Sunflower/Rider run and Playing in the Band—create an exhilarating arc that many consider one of the best from the 1988 summer tour.
